table-basic-rows.title: Basic row rendering
table-basic-rows.description: For the base page we show canonical table markup: the `#head` slot, body rows and composition with badges.

table-loading-state.title: Loading rows with skeletons
table-loading-state.description: Covers the data-display edge case: the table should look predictable in a loading state, when data has not arrived yet.

table-empty-state.title: Empty state inside tbody
table-empty-state.description: Shows how `GrTable` can host a `GrEmptyState` inside `tbody` without losing table semantics and the visual shell.

empty.emptyDescription: For data-display scenarios `GrTable` can host an empty state right inside the tbody without an extra shell component.
